rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §22.0837 governs fees for national criminal history record reviews. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The agency by rule shall require a person submitting to a national criminal history record information review under Section 22.0832, 22.0833, or 22.0836 to pay a fee for the review
_note: No conflict; the rule_text addresses an unrelated education code provision on criminal history record review fees.
